	verified = [v.get('Verified') for v in value]
	if False in verified:
		self.custom.routine.verified = False
	return value

##AutoSave Script

#		data = self.custom.routine

#		data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName

##			system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")
#			self.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.custom.triggerRefresh
#			pass

#Script to cause pramList to be unverified if name changed
#	system.perspective.print(origin)
	if origin == 'BindingWriteback':
		paramLists = self.custom.paramLists
		selectedList = self.custom.routine
		if paramLists:
			for paramList in paramLists:
				if paramList['key'] == selectedList['key']:
					if paramList['name'] != selectedList['name']:
						self.custom.routine.verified = False

selectedParameters = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(self.custom.selectedParameter)
	if len(selectedParameters) == 1 and self.custom.selectedRow != None:
		currentRow = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(self.custom.preSaveParams[self.custom.selectedTab][self.custom.selectedRow])
		newRow = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(selectedParameters[0])
		currentCompare = dict(currentRow)
		newCompare = dict(newRow)
		currentCompare.pop('Verified', None)
		newCompare.pop('Verified', None)
		if currentCompare != newCompare:
			newRow['Verified'] = False
			self.custom.preSaveParams[self.custom.selectedTab][self.custom.selectedRow] = newRow
			self.custom.routine.verified = False
		else:
			newRow['Verified'] = currentRow.get('Verified', False)
			self.custom.preSaveParams[self.custom.selectedTab][self.custom.selectedRow] = newRow

transforms.code:
resp = []
#	tabFormat = {'viewPath':'', 'viewParams':{'text':'TabName','verified':False}}
	paramLists = value['paramLists']
	fileTypes = value['fileTypes']
#	fileTypes.sort(key=lambda x: x['text'])
	for fileType in fileTypes:
		text = fileType['text']
		extensionTypeUUID = fileType['key']
		verified = next((p['verified'] for p in paramLists if p['extensionTypeUUID']==extensionTypeUUID),None)
		resp.append({'viewPath':'BlueRidge/Components/_Recipe/_Operation/tabData', 'viewParams':{'text':text,'verified':verified}})
	return resp

preSaveParams = value['preSaveParams']
	selectedTab = value['selectedTab']
	if preSaveParams and selectedTab != None and len(preSaveParams) > selectedTab:
		return preSaveParams[selectedTab]
	return []

onChange.script:
#	newTableData1 = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(currentValue.value)
	newTableData = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(self.custom.tableData)
	if newTableData:
		normilizedNew  = sorted([sorted(d.items()) for d in newTableData])
		
		fileTypeKey = self.custom.fileTypeKey
		fileTypeParameter = self.custom.parameters['Key{}'.format(fileTypeKey)]
		oldTableData = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(fileTypeParameter['tableData'])
		normilizedOld  = sorted([sorted(d.items()) for d in oldTableData])
		
	#	system.perspective.print('old:{0}, new:{1}'.format(normilizedOld,normilizedNew))
		if normilizedOld != normilizedNew:
			self.custom.parameters['Key{}'.format(fileTypeKey)]['tableData']=newTableData
	#		system.perspective.print('Not the same')
		else:
	#		system.perspective.print('Same data')
			pass

	import time
	
	self.custom.saveConfirmed = False
	
	self.view.getChild("root").saveChangesPreExisting()
	
	self.custom.saveConfirmed = True
	time.sleep(3)
	self.custom.saveConfirmed = False

data = self.view.params.operation
	data = system.util.jsonEncode(data)
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.Operation.update(data)
#	system.perspective.print("Update Button: {}".format(resp))

		system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

		parameters[i]['Verified'] = True
		self.view.custom.parameters[i].Verified = True
		BlueRidge.Recipe.HeadParameter.update(parameters[i])
		
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.routine['name'] = routineName

customMethods.name: getParamDefaults
customMethods.script:
extensions = self.view.custom.fileTypes
	defaultParams = []
	for item in extensions:
		params = BlueRidge.Config.ParamDefault.getAll(item['key'])
		paramList = []
		for param in params:
			if param['operationTypeUUID'] == self.view.params.operation.type:
				param['Verified'] = False
				paramList.append(param)
		defaultParams.append(paramList)
	
	return defaultParams

customMethods.name: loadWorkingParams
addParamToDatabase
customMethods.script:
data = {}
	data['parameterListUUID'] = self.view.custom.routine.key
	data['user'] = self.session.props.auth.user.userName
#	self.view.custom.routine.verified = False
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.HeadParameter.add(data)
	if resp == -1:
		self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
		pass

customMethods.name: addParamLocally
customMethods.script:
defaultData = {
		'Name': 'New Parameter',
		'Macro Variable': None,
		'Value': None,
		'key': None,
		'Verified': False,
		'Assignment': None,
		'operationTypeUUID': self.view.params.operation.type
	}
	
	extensionToAddTo = self.view.custom.selectedTab
	self.view.custom.preSaveParams[extensionToAddTo].append(defaultData)

customMethods.name: saveChangesPreExisting
saveChangesNew
customMethods.script:
#	operation = self.view.params.operation
#	parameters = self.view.custom.parameters
#	operationEngines = self.view.custom.operationEngines
	
	data = self.view.params.operation
	data = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
	data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.Operation.update(data)
	if resp == -1:
		pass

	data = self.view.custom.routine
	data = {
		'name': self.view.custom.routine.name or self.view.params.operation.name,
		'extensionTypeUUID': self.view.custom.fileTypeKey,
		'engineOperationUUID': self.view.custom.operationEngine.key,
		'verified': False,
		'available': self.view.params.operation.available,
		'user': self.session.props.auth.user.userName,
		'key': None
	}
	#data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
	#data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.ParameterList.update(data)
	if resp == -1:
#		self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
		pass
	
	
	datas = self.view.custom.preSaveParams[self.view.custom.selectedTab]
	datas = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(datas)
	for data in datas:
		data = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
		data['parameterListUUID'] = self.view.custom.routine.key
		data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
		resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.HeadParameter.update(data)
		if resp == -1:
			pass
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")
	system.perspective.sendMessage("HeadSelectButton", {'view': self.view.custom.selectedData})
	
	
#	prev_name = previousValue.getValue()['name'].value
#	curr_name = currentValue.getValue()['name'].value

customMethods.name: addDefaultRoutine
customMethods.script:
tabNum = 0
	for fileType in self.view.custom.fileTypes:
		
		data = {
			'user': self.session.props.auth.user.userName,
			'typeKey': fileType['key'],
			'opKey': headOperationUUID
		}
		resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.ParameterList.add(data)
		if resp == -1:
			self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
			pass
		
		routines = BlueRidge.Recipe.ParameterList.getAll(headOperationUUID)
		listId = ""
		for routine in routines:
			if routine['extensionTypeUUID'] == fileType['key']:
				listId = routine['key']
		BlueRidge.Config.Util.log("error %s" % listId)
		datas = self.view.custom.defaultParams
		datas = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(datas)
		parameters = datas[tabNum]
		for param in parameters:
#			param = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(param)
			param['parameterListUUID'] = listId
			param['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
			param['key'] = None
			resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.HeadParameter.update(param)
			if resp == -1:
				pass
		tabNum += 1

messageHandlers.script:
trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger
	system.perspective.sendMessage("OneShotButtonOperation", self.view.params.operation.key)

data = payload
#	addEngine = BlueRidge.Recipe.OperationEngine.getOne(addEngineKey)
#	currentEngines = self.view.custom.operationEngines
#	currentEngines.append(addEngine)
#	self.view.custom.operationEngines = currentEngines
	data['operationUUID'] = self.view.params.operation.key
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.OperationEngine.add(data)
	if resp == -1:
		self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
		pass

from org.python.core import PyArray
	
	if type(payload) == PyArray:
		param = payload[0]
		#system.perspective.print(param)
	elif type(payload) == dict:
		if 'messageType' in payload.keys():
			removeKey = payload['key']
	#		operations = self.view.custom.instances
			operationEngines = self.view.custom.operationEngines
			new_operationEngines = [d for d in operationEngines if d.get('key') != removeKey]
			self.view.custom.operationEngines = new_operationEngines
			self.view.custom.selectedData = 0
	else:
		pass

#	[
#  {
#    "Verified": "",
#    "Value": 9.25,
#    "Macro Variable": "#613",
#    "Name": "Min Deck Height21"
#  }
#]

data = payload
	data['operationUUID'] = self.view.params.operation.key
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.OperationHead.add(data)
	self.view.custom.selectedHead = data['headUUID']
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	operations = BlueRidge.Recipe.OperationHead.getOperationByHead(self.view.custom.selectedHead)
	for op in operations:
		if op['operationUUID'] == self.view.params.operation.key:
			self.view.custom.selectedData = op['headOperationUUID']
			system.perspective.sendMessage('HeadSelectButton', {'view': op['headOperationUUID']})
			break
	if resp == -1:
		self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
		pass

paramToArchive = self.view.custom.selectedRow
	tableData = self.view.custom.tableData
	paramData = self.view.custom.preSaveParams[self.view.custom.selectedTab]
	del tableData[paramToArchive]
	del paramData[paramToArchive]

self.view.custom.selectedData = payload['view']
	self.view.custom.selectedRow = None
	self.view.custom.selectedParameter = []
	self.loadWorkingParams()
